prompt: Before reading any excerpt, which title/subtitle would you pick up first?
How strongly does this title make you want to open the book?
How likely are you to remember this title tomorrow?
How serious and prize-book credible does this title feel?
How clearly does this title signal the book is specifically about LLMs, language, code, and computing?
How naturally would this title sit beside serious tech/history/business nonfiction?
After reading the excerpt package, how truthful does this title feel to the actual manuscript?
How likely would you be to recommend a book with this title to the right reader?
Does this title make the book sound hypey, generic, too narrow, too technical, or otherwise misleading?
After a delay, which titles can you recall without seeing the list?
